svg.text: Running best CER50k by suite; lower is better. Bottom panel tracks the targeted main-unshuffled Gemma/OpenAI and OpenAI/Qwen sweeps.

50 core-100k discard mean=0.501332: freezing dynamic anchors after early rounds worsened low-data suite

56 core-100k discard mean=0.495868: assignment swap repair improved mean but regressed max hard pair

70 core-100k keep mean=0.460496: four direct-bigram refinement passes improve every low-data tokenizer pair over the third pass

103 core-100k discard mean=0.472496: repair-closure node selection overfit proposed swaps and worsened low-data suite

173 gemma-o200k-1m-unshuffled-lock192-seed diagnostic mean=0.298040: true unshuffled low-ID lock plus structural anchors improves 1m but is weaker than adding structural features
180 mainu-gemma-o200k-1m-l192-seed-feat005 diagnostic mean=0.291580: structural feature regularization improves the lock192 1m branch but lock128 features are better
184 mainu-gemma-o200k-1m-l128-seed diagnostic mean=0.292580: lock128 without structural features improves over lock192 but is not best
188 mainu-gemma-o200k-1m-l256-seed discard mean=0.294740: lock256 is too wide for Gemma to o200k at 1m
192 mainu-gemma-o200k-1m-l192-seed-feat005-w010 discard mean=0.300720: id proximity weight 0.10 over-regularizes Gemma to o200k at 1m
193 mainu-gemma-o200k-1m-l192-seed-feat005-w002 discard mean=0.293740: id proximity weight 0.02 is too weak for the Gemma 1m feature branch
201 mainu-gemma-o200k-1m-l128-seed-feat005 keep mean=0.288880: best Gemma to o200k 1m result: narrower low-ID lock plus structural feature regularization
202 mainu-gemma-o200k-1m-l160-seed-feat005 discard mean=0.293600: lock160 with structural features is worse than lock128 at Gemma 1m
203 mainu-gemma-o200k-1m-l224-seed-feat005 diagnostic mean=0.290300: lock224 with structural features is close but worse than lock128 at Gemma 1m
211 mainu-gemma-o200k-1m-l128-seed-feat005-anneal0802 discard mean=0.290240: annealing ID proximity from 0.08 to 0.02 admits late noise and loses versus constant 0.05 on Gemma 1m
212 mainu-gemma-o200k-1m-l128-seed-feat005-anneal0500 discard mean=0.291080: removing ID proximity by the last round hurts Gemma 1m despite the same structural feature setup
Gemma -> o200k 1M best=0.298040 at 56c30af: true unshuffled low-ID lock plus structural anchors improves 1m but is weaker than adding structural features

Gemma -> o200k 1M best=0.288880 at 36ee2dc: best Gemma to o200k 1m result: narrower low-ID lock plus structural feature regularization
175 gemma-o200k-10m-unshuffled-lock192-seed keep mean=0.162880: true unshuffled low-ID lock plus structural anchors gives large Gemma to o200k 10m gain
182 mainu-gemma-o200k-10m-l192-seed-feat005 discard mean=0.167560: structural feature regularization hurts Gemma to o200k at 10m
186 mainu-gemma-o200k-10m-l128-seed discard mean=0.166640: lock128 regresses Gemma to o200k at 10m
190 mainu-gemma-o200k-10m-l256-seed diagnostic mean=0.164120: lock256 ties the best retuned 10m widths but remains worse than the prior lock192 baseline
194 mainu-gemma-o200k-10m-l192-seed-w010 diagnostic mean=0.164240: id proximity weight 0.10 is close but does not beat the Gemma 10m baseline
195 mainu-gemma-o200k-10m-l192-seed-w002 discard mean=0.166980: id proximity weight 0.02 regresses Gemma to o200k at 10m
204 mainu-gemma-o200k-10m-l160-seed diagnostic mean=0.164120: lock160 ties lock256 but does not beat the prior lock192 baseline at Gemma 10m
205 mainu-gemma-o200k-10m-l224-seed discard mean=0.166260: lock224 regresses Gemma to o200k at 10m
213 mainu-gemma-o200k-10m-l192-seed-anneal1002 discard mean=0.167320: strong early ID proximity still over-constrains Gemma 10m even when decayed to 0.02
214 mainu-gemma-o200k-10m-l192-seed-anneal0500 keep mean=0.161180: best Gemma to o200k 10m result: use low-ID structure early, then decay smooth ID proximity to zero
219 mainu-gemma-o200k-10m-l192-seed-anneal0500-pow05 diagnostic mean=0.161040: faster ID-prior decay slightly improves Gemma 10m versus linear decay but is weaker than slow decay
220 mainu-gemma-o200k-10m-l192-seed-anneal0500-pow20 keep mean=0.158320: best Gemma to o200k 10m result: keep ID proximity through mid-rounds, then decay quadratically to zero
221 mainu-gemma-o200k-10m-l192-seed-anneal0501 diagnostic mean=0.161040: leaving a small final ID prior ties fast decay but loses to fully removing the late prior
222 mainu-gemma-o200k-10m-l192-seed-anneal0400 discard mean=0.161560: lower initial ID proximity underfits early Gemma 10m alignment versus starting at 0.05
223 mainu-gemma-o200k-10m-l192-seed-anneal0500-pow15 diagnostic mean=0.159000: slower-than-linear ID-prior decay is good, but slightly worse than quadratic timing
224 mainu-gemma-o200k-10m-l192-seed-anneal0500-pow30 discard mean=0.160520: holding the ID prior too long regresses versus the quadratic decay sweet spot
